title: verbena connatibracteata f. normalis
intro: Verbena connatibracteata f. normalis, also known as the 'Dwarf Verbena', is a low-growing, spreading herbaceous perennial plant native to Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and flowers of Verbena connatibracteata f. normalis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
